name: Paulie Gee's (Chicago)
teaser: Wicker Park has my favorite NY-style in Chicago. The Detroit squares could be the real star.
review: Wicker Park is a great slice shop that has my favorite NY-style in the city. Logan Square has good wood-fired pies, but the real star could be the Detroit Style squares owner Derrick Tung cooks up.
headsUp: Wicker Park for slices, Logan Square for wood-fired pies.
update: Detroit squares at Logan Square are seriously underrated.
